hero.headline: The scent of power.
hero.sub: Luxury Arabic & Oriental perfumery, crafted for those who command presence.

brand.title: Born from the East
brand.description: Mushy Parfum is a tribute to the ancient art of Arabic perfumery — where ingredients are sacred, craftsmanship is devotion, and every bottle holds a story worth telling.

featured.title: The Collection
featured.subtitle: Handcrafted for those who leave a trail.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Where the East meets eternity.
about.story1: Mushy Parfum was born from a deep reverence for Arabic perfumery — an art form thousands of years old, rooted in the spice routes of the ancient world.
about.story2: We believe perfume is not decoration. It is identity. It is memory. It is the invisible signature you leave in every room you enter and every person you encounter.
about.story3: Our fragrances are composed using the finest raw materials from across the Arab world — Omani frankincense, Cambodian oud, Iranian saffron, and Bulgarian rose absolute — because luxury is not a label. It is a standard.
about.mission: To bring the soul of Oriental perfumery to the world, without compromise, without apology.
about.vision: A world where every person can carry the power of Eastern luxury wherever they go.
